_meta.description: Registry of pluggable geographic overlays for the ASTRA map renderer (astra/dashboard/geo_layers.js). Each entry names a layer, its geometry kind, its data file, its default style, and whether it is shown by default. The renderer has ZERO hardcoded geometry -- it only knows how to draw whatever this manifest points it at. Layer files start out as empty GeoJSON FeatureCollections; converting the Vietnam AIP into these files (later) is the only step needed to populate the map -- no renderer/architecture change.
_meta.coordinate_order: Every layer file is standard GeoJSON: coordinates are [lon, lat], not [lat, lon].
_meta.adding_a_layer: To add a new overlay type, add one entry here plus one new (initially empty) FeatureCollection file. No JS change needed unless the geometry/marker kind is genuinely new (polygon/line/point are already generic).
